meta.title: Codentra — Next-generation software powered by AI
meta.description: Codentra designs and ships next-generation software powered by AI. Makers of Contivo, the modern platform for Polish accounting firms. Świdnica, Poland.
meta.ogTitle: Codentra — Next-generation software powered by AI
meta.ogDescription: We design and ship next-generation AI-powered software. Makers of Contivo.

hero.descriptionPre: We design and ship next-generation digital products — driven by artificial intelligence, crafted with obsessive attention to detail. We build
hero.descriptionPost: and the systems coming after it, the ones that change the rules.

about.description: We're a team of engineers, designers and strategists who treat code as a tool for change. We build software that is fast, elegant and deeply practical — all at once.

principles.title: AI at the core
principles.body: We don't bolt models on at the end — we design systems where LLMs are first-class citizens of the architecture.

principles.title: Velocity without compromise
principles.body: Short iterations, deploy automation and observability from day zero. We ship to production many times a day.

principles.title: Full stack ownership
principles.body: From interface, through API and cloud infrastructure, to the data model — we take responsibility for the entire chain.

principles.title: Compliance & security
principles.body: KSeF, GDPR, social security, e-invoicing — we work with Polish regulations and know them inside out. It's the difference between a prototype and a production system.

screens.title: The accounting firm dashboard
screens.body: A whole month of work on one screen — documents, deadlines, payments and the status of every client.

screens.title: AI reads the documents
screens.body: An invoice lands in the inbox, the model extracts line items, codes them and matches the right client.

screens.title: From commit to production
screens.body: A change reaches production in minutes — with tests, preview and full monitoring.

products.description: Every Codentra product is the answer to a concrete business problem. We build them with the same philosophy — AI at the core, exceptional ergonomics, full compliance with Polish law.
products.contivoDescription: Contivo replaces six tools with one. E-invoicing, JPK, social security, HR & payroll, fixed assets — everything in a single Polish platform with an AI assistant that gives accountants hours back every day.
products.comingSoonBody: We're building a new product that will once again change the rules — this time in a different industry. Launch coming soon.

tech.description: We pick technologies that won't let us down in two years. We invest in tooling that gives us an edge in speed and quality.

capabilities.title: AI Engineering
capabilities.body: LLM agents, RAG, function calling, fine-tuning, evaluations. We embed AI where it genuinely creates an edge.

capabilities.title: Full-stack development
capabilities.body: Frontend, backend, databases, queues, integrations. One team from the first line of code to production.

capabilities.title: Cloud & DevOps
capabilities.body: CI/CD, infrastructure as code, monitoring, SLOs. Production-grade stability from the very first deploy.

capabilities.title: Product design
capabilities.body: UX, motion, design systems. The kind of interface you want to stay in longer than you need to.

process.description: Four clear stages, one point of contact, transparent progress.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We understand the business, its users and constraints. We define a measurable product goal — before writing a single line of code.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.body: In 2–3 weeks we deliver a working version of the product's core. Real, clickable, tested with users.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Iterative development of the full feature set. Daily deploys, continuous testing, transparent progress.

steps.title: Ship & scale
steps.body: Production launch, monitoring, optimization of AI and infrastructure costs. We stay with you long term.

contact.description: Tell us about the problem you want to solve. We get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: What are you working on and how can we help?
form.privacy: By submitting the form you agree to the processing of your data for response purposes.

footer.description: A next-generation software house. We design and ship AI-driven digital products. From Świdnica.

contivoPage.metaTitle: Contivo — the first Polish AI-Native accounting system | A modern alternative to Optima, Enova, Symfonia
contivoPage.metaDescription: Contivo is the first AI-Native accounting system in Poland — artificial intelligence reads and posts documents, tracks deadlines and regulations. Full KSeF, JPK and ZUS compliance. A modern alternative to Optima, Enova and Symfonia.
contivoPage.keywords: AI accounting system, AI bookkeeping, artificial intelligence in accounting, AI-native, software for accounting firms, accounting automation, Optima alternative, Enova alternative, Symfonia alternative, KSeF, JPK, ZUS, Contivo
contivoPage.ogTitle: Contivo — the first Polish AI-Native accounting system
contivoPage.ogDescription: Artificial intelligence that posts documents, tracks regulations and deadlines. The first AI-Native system for accounting firms in Poland — a real alternative to Optima, Enova and Symfonia.
contivoPage.badge: First in Poland · AI-Native accounting system
contivoPage.titlePre: The first Polish accounting system built on an
contivoPage.lead: Contivo is a new generation of software for accounting firms — built around artificial intelligence from the very first line of code. It is not yet another accounting program with a bolted-on “AI” feature. It is the first system in Poland where artificial intelligence genuinely reads and posts documents, tracks deadlines and regulations, while the accountant simply approves. A modern, fully cloud-based alternative to Optima, Enova and Symfonia.
contivoPage.description: Contivo is Codentra's flagship product — the first Polish accounting system designed from the ground up around AI. It replaces six separate tools with one platform, fully compliant with Polish regulations.
highlights: AI reads and posts documents automatically
100% Polish stack — code, hosting and data in PL
Compliant with KSeF, JPK, ZUS, GDPR, tax law
Fully cloud-based — no installs, no paid updates
contivoPage.firstTitlePre: Not a “program with an AI feature”.
contivoPage.firstBody: Most accounting software on the Polish market was created before the era of artificial intelligence, with AI added later as an add-on. Contivo takes a different path: artificial intelligence is the core of the system, and we built the entire accounting workflow around it. That is a fundamental difference — and the reason Contivo is the first fully AI-Native Polish accounting system.

firstPoints.t: AI at the core, not bolted on
firstPoints.d: Artificial intelligence reads, codes and posts documents automatically — it does not just suggest.
The model adapts postings to the history, chart of accounts and practice of each specific company.
The AI assistant knows the current legal state: KSeF, JPK, the Accounting Act, PIT, CIT and VAT.

firstPoints.t: Built in Poland, for Polish law
firstPoints.d: 100% Polish code, hosting and data — no documents sent abroad.

contivoPage.compareIntro: Optima, Enova and Symfonia are proven, mature systems — but they were created when artificial intelligence did not exist in accounting. We design Contivo from scratch around AI, so it automates what traditional systems still do by hand.

compareRows.a: An add-on bolted onto an existing system
compareRows.b: AI-Native — artificial intelligence at the core

compareRows.a: None or a static knowledge base

compareRows.b: Fully cloud-based, available in the browser

contivoPage.compareNote: The comparison is illustrative and concerns the product approach. Optima, Enova and Symfonia are trademarks of their respective owners.

modules.name: Invoicing & KSeF
modules.desc: Issuing and receiving structured e-invoices through KSeF, automatic AI reading of inbound documents.

modules.name: JPK
modules.desc: Generating JPK_V7, JPK_KR and JPK_FA directly from the system, no external tools.

modules.name: ZUS DRA
modules.desc: Automatic social security calculations, ZUS reports, payroll integration.

modules.name: HR & payroll
modules.desc: Full employee records, bonuses, deductions, leave, pay runs.

modules.name: Fixed assets
modules.desc: Asset registry and automatic depreciation in line with Polish tax law.

modules.name: AI assistant
modules.desc: An LLM-powered assistant — posts documents, answers regulatory questions, flags issues and automates routine work.

aiItems.d: An invoice arrives, AI reads the line items, codes them to the right accounts and matches the client. You just approve.
Ask about a VAT rate, the moment a tax obligation arises or a deductible cost — the AI assistant answers with a reference to the regulation.
AI catches missing documents, unusual amounts and upcoming JPK, ZUS and tax-return deadlines.
Repetitive postings, settlements and reports run in the background — the accountant handles what requires judgement.
The longer you work, the sharper the suggestions — the model adapts to your chart of accounts and practice.
The model supports Polish accounting: the Accounting Act, PIT, CIT, VAT, KSeF and JPK.

faq.q: Is Contivo really the first Polish AI-Native accounting system?
faq.a: Yes. Contivo is the first system for accounting firms in Poland designed from the ground up around artificial intelligence. AI is not an add-on here but the core of the system, genuinely reading and posting documents.

faq.q: How is Contivo different from Optima, Enova and Symfonia?
faq.a: Traditional systems were created before the AI era and most accounting work is done manually in them. Contivo automates document posting thanks to its AI-Native architecture and runs fully in the cloud — no installs, no paid updates.

faq.q: Is Contivo compliant with KSeF, JPK and ZUS?
faq.a: Yes. Contivo natively supports KSeF, generates JPK_V7, JPK_KR and JPK_FA, and handles ZUS — with no external plugins.
Yes. Code, hosting and data stay in Poland, and the system is GDPR-compliant.
For accounting firms and finance teams that want to automate work with AI instead of hiring more people.

faq.q: Can I migrate to Contivo from another accounting program?
faq.a: Yes. Contivo supports taking over a company from your current system, including importing HR data and historical settlements.

contivoPage.ctaBannerBody: The full feature list, pricing and more FAQ are on the product site contivo.pl.
